The '''''Thunder''''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During the [[Battle of Nocto]], the Airam sent the Corvette, fully-loaded with [[Proton bomb/Legends|Proton bombs]], to ram the Star Dreadnought [[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']]{{'s}} bridge. It did so and completely obliterated the bridge, and shortly after a squadron of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-Wing]] starfighters destroyed the Super Star Destroyer by taking out it's shields.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''
